message:
fix: prevent zombie detection race, spawning invisibility, and escalation loops (gt-3ltnm)

- Add TOCTOU guard: record detection timestamp and verify session has not been
  recreated before nuking, preventing newly-spawned polecats from being killed
- Include agent_state=spawning in zombie detection so polecats that crash
  during spawn phase are no longer invisible to patrol
- Add dedup via findAnyCleanupWisp: skip escalation when cleanup wisp already
  exists, preventing infinite escalation loops on repeated patrol cycles
- Add real tests for zombie classification logic, directory scanning,
  sessionRecreated, and findAnyCleanupWisp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
